calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-07-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing
Off Calendar Jun-25-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Lynn O'Malley Taylor, Clerk: J. Murphy, Court Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR #6840.

Anothony M. Isola, Esq.and Justin C. White Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, David Ekhaus
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Channel Island Media Group Inc., a Delaware Corporation, Robin Ross Cooper, an individual and Rober Kulakowski, an individual.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Does 1-30 dismissal on file.
Witness:David Sworn and examined on his own behalf.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $90,00.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $6,978.78
Attorney's Fees: $10,425.00
Costs: $2,122.09
Total Judgment in the amount of $109,525.87
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-06-2015 Continued To Aug-26-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
